findings.description: Section s3 hints are missing `nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpErrorHandler`, which is the class name used in both XML configuration code examples in that section. Users asking about configuring HttpErrorHandler may search by this fully-qualified class name.
findings.source_evidence: Source XML examples use `class="nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpErrorHandler"` in both the defaultPages and writeFailureLogPattern configuration snippets.
